directions: Place first 7 ingredients in a large saucepan over medium-low heat, bring to boil.
Add onion, and remaining ingredients, stir to combine.
Reduce heat and simmer for 1 1/2 hours or until thick, stirring occasionally.

name: Smoked Salmon Spread Lightened Up
directions: In a medium mixing bowl, combine the yogurt and Laughing Cow Cheese until smooth.  Stir in the remaining regredients.
Place in a container with tight fitting lid and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.  Stir before serving and garnish with additional freshly snipped chives as desired.

similar.name: Tortillas Roll Ups With Smoked Salmon Spread

name: Chickpeas and Maple Syrup Spread
directions: Put the chickpeas, maple syrup, lemon juice, almonds and raisins in the bowl of the food processor.  Pulse a few seconds.
Spread the mixture on bread.  Or crackers.

similar.name: Cinnamon Apple Spread for Tea Sandwiches

name: Smashed Chickpea Salad
directions: Mix everything but the olive oil in a small to midsize bowl. Very lightly smash the chickpea mixture with the back of a fork or a potato masher. You're not looking for a hummus-like puree but something closer to a coarse chop with a few smaller bits to hold it together. Add the glugs of olive oil, mix it lightly and enjoy.

name: Chicken Liver Pate
directions: Warm butter and oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chicken livers and saute until brown, about 10 minutes.
Add brandy, stock, mustard, rosemary, green peppercorns, and garlic.
Bring to a boil and boil vigorously until most of liquid has evaporated.
Transfer to a food processor along with softened butter and process until smooth.
Season with salt.
Transfer to small dish and refrigerate.

name: Hot Dog Spread / Dip
directions: Cut hot dogs into 1/2 inch pieces, place in food processer and pulse on low until chopped (not smooth). Add mustard, onion, pickle relish and dash of pepper, pulse on low until meat is a bit finer. Add salad dressing and pulse on low until almost smooth.

name: Curried Egg and Artichoke Spread
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Adjust spices.

name: Chicken Spread
directions: In a food processor, combine jalapenos, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, cayenne and paprika.  Chop well, but do not puree.
Add chicken and sour cream.  Pulse slowly.   Add cream and pulse until it is the desired consistency.
Season to taste with salt and pepper.
If too thick, add more cream.
Serve on crackers, cucumbers, as a dip or make a sandwich with it!

similar.name: Tortillas Roll Ups With Smoked Salmon Spread

name: Cinnamon Apple Spread for Tea Sandwiches
directions: Combine cream cheese, brown sugar and vanilla; beat at medium speed with an electric mixer about a minute or until smooth; set aside.
Cut each bread slice into a 3-inch round, or if it’s large enough, two rounds at least 2 inches. Use a fruit glass to help.
Core apples and cut into seven slices, and brush with orange juice.
Spread about a tablespoon of cheese mixture onto each bread round; top with an apple slice.
Sprinkle peanuts in center.

name: Jalapeno Egg Salad
directions: Peel the eggs and roughly chop. Gently stir in the jalapeno, green onion, ground cumin, mayonnaise, mustard and lemon juice. Add salt, black pepper  to taste.
Serve either on bread for a sandwich or tortilla chips as a dip.

similar.name: Egg Salad With Shrimp and Bacon

name: Mushroom Pate (EASY)
directions: Heat oil in large frying pan over medium heat. Add onion and garlic and cook for 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
Add dried and fresh mushrooms and cook for 8 – 10 minutes. Add port, toss to coat and set aside.
In a food processor, add mushroom mixture and blend until finely chopped. Season with salt and pepper.
Add in feta cheese and pulse until smooth, adding water is required. (I used 3 tablespoons).
Stir through parsley. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
ENJOY!
* NOTE: No need to pre-soak the dried mushrooms.

name: Skinny Egg Salad
directions: Boil the eggs for 15 minutes. Remove the eggs from the burner and let them sit in the boiling water for 5 more minutes.

Put the eggs in a bowl of ice water and allow to cool 10-15 minutes. Peel the eggs under cold running water (this will help the shells to come away from the eggs without taking chunks out of your eggs).
Once you have peeled your eggs, place them in a large bowl. Cut the eggs in 1/2 the long way. Remove all but 2 yolks. Mash the eggs with a wide tooth fork until they are to the size of your liking.
Add all other ingredients to the mashed eggs and mix well with a wooden spoon. Adjust seanonings to your taste. Feel free to drizzle olive oil and a squeeze of lemon over your salad. Yum!

similar.name: Egg Salad With Shrimp and Bacon
